name: Create Test OIDC Deployer User
description: Creates a machine user with ORG_OWNER role and client credentials for test OIDC operations. The deployer CLI authenticates as this user to create OIDC apps for other applications.

parameters.name: Zitadel Project ID
parameters.description: Internal Zitadel project ID emitted by 340-post-setup-deployer-in-zitadel. Required so skip_if_all_missing can resolve to a real value when present (otherwise the check always sees NOT_DEFINED and the template is silently skipped, leaving /bootstrap/test-deployer.json absent and breaking the Phase D grant hook).

parameters.name: Domain Suffix
parameters.description: Domain suffix for constructing external URLs
